name: Biblioplex Research Assistant
description: Help patrons locate texts, assist with the cataloguing and re-shelving of newly acquired volumes, and maintain the organizational enchantments that keep the library from becoming an unknowable labyrinth.
socialOpportunities: Regular contact with scholars from all colleges. Access to research areas that students don't normally visit.
roleplaying_hooks: You overhear research topics. You know which professors are investigating what. Restricted section requests go through you.
reward: Access to extended Biblioplex hours and limited restricted section privileges.

name: Firejolt Café Staff
description: Prepare and serve Firejolt's legendary rotating menu of alchemical coffees, enchanted teas, and magical pastries. The café is the social center of campus, which means this job puts you in contact with everyone.
socialOpportunities: You see literally everyone. Campus gossip reaches you first. You know who drinks what and when.
roleplaying_hooks: A worried student spends hours here. Someone orders something they've never ordered before. A drink gets mixed up in a way that causes a small magical incident.
reward: Free drinks during shifts and first access to new menu items.

name: Bow's End Tavern Server
description: Serve food and drinks at the most popular evening gathering spot on campus. The tavern attracts students unwinding after class, celebrating successes, and having the kinds of conversations they wouldn't have during the day.
responsibilities: Keeping the peace during busy nights
socialOpportunities: Evening campus life. Celebrations, arguments, confessions, and everything in between happens at your tables.
roleplaying_hooks: Someone asks you to deliver a note. An argument at a table gets heated. A group celebrating turns somber when a name gets mentioned.
reward: Tips, meals during shifts, and a front-row seat to campus social life.

name: Campus Grounds Crew
description: Maintain the extensive magical gardens, enchanted walkways, and outdoor spaces across campus. The work involves both mundane upkeep and magical maintenance of growing, animated, or otherwise magically active outdoor features.
socialOpportunities: You move through every corner of campus. You see the parts of Strixhaven that most students never notice.
roleplaying_hooks: You find something strange growing somewhere it shouldn't. A hidden part of campus opens up. Early morning shifts mean seeing who's sneaking out or back in.
reward: First access to interesting plant-based discoveries. Knowledge of campus geography unavailable to most.

name: Campus Store Clerk
description: Staff the campus's primary supply shop. Handle inventory of spell components, student supplies, and campus merchandise. Process orders and assist customers in finding what they need.
socialOpportunities: You know what everyone is buying, which tells you what everyone is working on. High volume of student contact.
roleplaying_hooks: Someone buys components for something unusual. You notice a pattern in what's going out of stock. A special order arrives for something no student should have.
reward: Employee discount and access to inventory lists.

name: Witherbloom Lab Assistant
description: Assist Witherbloom faculty with ongoing research — preparing specimens, maintaining lab equipment, cataloguing new biological and magical plant discoveries, and occasionally helping with field work in Sedgemoor.
socialOpportunities: Close working relationship with faculty. Access to research that isn't published yet.
roleplaying_hooks: A specimen behaves unexpectedly. A professor asks you to catalog something quietly. Research notes mention something that should have been destroyed.
reward: Access to rare reagents and Witherbloom faculty mentorship.

name: Campus Infirmary Aide
description: Support the campus healing staff in the infirmary. Prepare healing supplies, assist patients, and handle administrative tasks. The infirmary sees everyone — accidents in magical classes are not uncommon.
socialOpportunities: You see everyone at their most vulnerable. Confidential relationships develop. Campus health patterns become visible.
roleplaying_hooks: A patient says something strange under healing magic. You notice an unusual pattern in injuries. Someone asks to be treated quietly, off the record.
reward: Access to basic healing supplies and infirmary resources.
